ddls:
CREATE TABLE "research_papers" (
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research paper */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Cluster ID assigned by HDBSCAN */,
  "cited_by" INTEGER /* Number of papers citing this paper */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., Article, Conference Paper) */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the research paper */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the research paper */,
  "author_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords provided by the authors */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the research paper */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) */,
  "x" REAL /* X-coordinate for spatial data visualization */,
  "y" REAL /* Y-coordinate for spatial data visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the paper was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the paper was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the paper */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the paper file */,
  "is_draft" INTEGER /* Whether the paper is a draft */,
  "is_published" INTEGER /* Whether the paper is published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_papers_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("cluster_id") REFERENCES clusters ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the author */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation event */,
  "citing_paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper that is citing another paper */,
  "cited_paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the paper being cited */,
  "citation_type" TEXT /* Type of citation (e.g., self-citation, co-author citation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_cited_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("cited_paper_id") REFERENCES research_papers ("paper_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_citing_paper_id FOREIGN KEY ("citing_paper_id") REFERENCES research_papers ("paper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clusters" (
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cluster */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or characteristics of the cluster */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cluster was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cluster was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "paper_authors" (
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research paper */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "author_order" INTEGER /* Order of the author in the paper */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paper_id", "author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "paper_versions" (
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research paper */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the paper */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the paper file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paper_id", "version")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_paper_access" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research paper */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user to the paper (e.g., read, write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "paper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "paper_tags" (
  "paper_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research paper */,
  "tag" TEXT /* Tag or keyword for the paper */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("paper_id", "tag")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each research paper
Number of papers citing this paper
Type of document (e.g., Article, Conference Paper)
Timestamp when the paper was created
Timestamp when the paper was last updated
Whether the paper is a draft
Unique identifier for each citation event
ID of the paper that is citing another paper
ID of the paper being cited
Type of citation (e.g., self-citation, co-author citation)
Description or characteristics of the cluster
Timestamp when the cluster was created
Timestamp when the cluster was last updated
Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin)
Order of the author in the paper
Timestamp when the version was created
Access level of the user to the paper (e.g., read, write)
Tag or keyword for the paper
